name: Wrapping Spider
description:
A giant monster spider/arachnid that actually acts like one, wrapping its prey in layers and layers of sticky silk.

The spider bites, skitters, crawls, dangles, spins webbing, wraps prey, lays eggs with ovipositors, envenomates, gag, cobwebs, funnelwebs, tunnelwebs.

Spider Variants: Orb weaver, funnelweb, trapdoor, netcasting, jumping, sheet spiders

Positions:

hogtie

wall pin

marionette

inverted suspension

fetal position

doggy

Themes: bondage
creator: Doll_MD
